since_last: 29% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.53%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.72% · Gold +0.47% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 29% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.53%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.53%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at -5.11%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +4.76%, SAP +1.67%, NOW +1.52%, PLTR +1.28%, WDAY +1.12%. Laggards: CEVA -5.11%, ARM -4.54%, MU -4.36%, MRVL -3.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.60% at $150.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
